meaning: 1. to choose arbitrarily; 2. to take whichever one fancies
sentence: 套餐包含三道菜，可任选口味。
pinyin: Tàocān bāohán sān dào cài, kě rènxuǎn kǒuwèi.
english: The set meal includes three dishes; you can freely choose the flavors.

sentence: 新政策让这座城市走向中兴。
pinyin: Xīn zhèngcè ràng zhè zuò chéngshì zǒuxiàng zhōngxīng.
english: The new policy has set the city on a path to resurgence.

sentence: 他一点半分都不肯让步。
pinyin: Tā yīdiǎn bàn fēn dōu bù kěn ràngbù.
english: He is not willing to give even a little bit of ground.

sentence: 医生用X射线检查了他的手腕。
pinyin: Yīshēng yòng X shèxiàn jiǎnchá le tā de shǒuwàn.
english: The doctor examined his wrist with an X-ray.

meaning: 1. to be saved from; 2. to be spared (something)
sentence: 接种疫苗可以免于感染这种病毒。
pinyin: Jiēzhòng yìmiáo kěyǐ miǎnyú gǎnrǎn zhè zhǒng bìngdú.
english: Getting vaccinated can spare you from infection by this virus.
